message.thinking:
We need to answer each of the 3 evaluation questions. Provide JSON array with 3 objects. Each object has keys: "question", "feedback", "complies". "question" should be one word: "Chapters", "Description", "Structure" depending on question. Provide feedback: highlight problems. Complies boolean.

We examine the text: "Šajā darbā līdzības jeb plaģiātisma problemātika tiek apskatīta konceptu karšu kontekstā. Lai veiksmīgi izpildīt uzdevumus un sasniegtu bakalaura darba mērķi, ir jāaplūko ne tikai līdzības noteikšanas jēdziens, bet arī jāpēta konceptu karšu būtība un jāatrod risinājums, kas ļautu noteikt līdzības konceptu kartēs."

This is a single paragraph, not listing chapters. So for Chapters: it does not list main sections. So fails. Feedback: mention no list. Complies false.

Description: Does the text briefly describe contents of each section? No. There's no description of sections. So fails. Feedback: mention no description. Complies false.

Structure: Can it be easily understood what is the general structure? No. It's just one paragraph. So fails. Feedback: mention no structure. Complies false.

Thus all false.

Return array of 3 objects.

Let's craft JSON.
